title: Disabling Weekends Not Working After Implementing Automation using Offsets - Why?
excerpt: We have disabled weekends in the main settings and the group settings. But it’s not working after creating an automation with offsets. Is there a fix for this? I’ve seen other people talking about this issue.

posts.author: DaniGilboa (Dani Sarusi )
posts.cookedHtml: We have disabled weekends in the main settings and the group settings. But it’s not working after creating an automation with offsets. Is there a fix for this? I’ve seen other people talking about this issue.
